RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0002 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: Sunrise Motors VIN: VIN42796AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Honda Elantra base 1 35,049 35,049 2 Destination fee 1 1,173 1,173 3 Options package 1 3,694 3,694 4 Doc fee 1 380 380 5 Tax 1 2,407 2,407 Total: $42,703
